_doc.purpose: Ovulation-trigger medication (real-world analogue: hCG trigger shot). hCG structurally mimics LH, substituting for the natural LH surge - ovulation follows ~36-40h later, reliably, regardless of where the natural cycle was. Modeled here as a presence-only status checked once per day by Character_Trainable.TickMenstruation: while active, the cycle is forced straight into the ovulate-eligible stage and the womb ovulates directly, every day the status is active (not just once on a transition) - covers 'already ovulating, ovulate again' from repeated/extended dosing.
_doc.duration_reasoning: Uses maxDuration (a hard 1-day countdown on Status_Base, independent of severity) instead of decaySpeed approximation - a trigger shot's window of effect is a fixed one-shot event, not a fading dose. No baselineVariation configured, so severity never decays; the status disappears outright when its 1440-minute duration reaches 0.
_doc.real_world_deviation: Real hCG is injected, not ingested, and only works on an already near-mature follicle (late follicular phase) - modeled here as an oral ingestible for consistency with the other reproduction medications in this codebase (no injectable item mechanic exists), and effective in any actively-cycling non-pregnant stage rather than gated to just the late-follicular stage, per design decision.
_doc.neutral_default: Default value is severity 0 (status absent) so any character never given the item behaves exactly as before this feature was added.

list._comment: Applied by consumable_medicine_ovulation_trigger. Severity spikes near 50 on dose and stays flat (no decay) until its maxDuration (1440 min = 1 day) runs out, at which point it's removed outright.

variants._note: No stat_modifiers - this status is only ever queried for presence (severity > 0) by Character_Trainable/ReproductionCycle.

list.tooltip: A fast-acting ovulation-inducing tablet. Forces the body to release an egg shortly after taking it, regardless of where the cycle currently stands - has no effect during prepuberty or pregnancy.

comp_Ingestible._note: Single urgent-use dose, same pacing as consumable_medicine_contraceptive_emergency (~1hr onset), dose sized to push chara_status_ovulation_trigger to its 50-severity ceiling (20*3=60 delivered, comfortably clamps to 50).

en-us.consumable_medicine_ovulation_trigger_to: A fast-acting ovulation-inducing tablet. Forces the body to release an egg shortly after taking it, regardless of where the cycle currently stands - has no effect during prepuberty or pregnancy.

zh-cn.chara_status_ovulation_trigger_tooltip: 会在下次经期判定时进入排卵期。判定优先度低于避孕药物
zh-cn.consumable_medicine_ovulation_trigger_to: 一种速效促排卵药片。服用后不久会强制身体排出卵子，无论当前周期处于哪个阶段————但在青春期前或孕期服用无效。
